identity.name: Shadow-AI Asset Discovery & Inventory — Cortex Cloud AI-SPM (T1526)
identity.summary: Cortex Cloud AI Security Posture Management scans an AWS account and inventories every AI/ML asset — SageMaker endpoints and models, Bedrock-targeted Lambda integrations, training-data S3 buckets, serialized model objects, and the IAM roles bound to them. The scenario validates that all planted shadow-AI assets surface in the AI inventory within one scan cycle, each carrying model_type / data_s…
identity.description: Shadow AI is the unmanaged sprawl of model endpoints, training pipelines, and third-party LLM integrations that teams stand up faster than security can track. The first job of AI Security Posture Management is discovery: enumerate every AI/ML asset across the cloud estate before reasoning about its risk. This scenario plants a representative shadow-AI fixture — a SageMaker endpoint and model, a Lambda function proxying to OpenAI, an S3 training-data bucket, an insecurely-serialized pickled model object, and an over-privileged execution role — then validates that Cortex Cloud AI-SPM discovers all of them in a single scan cycle. Detection here is posture-oriented rather than detonation-based: the validation queries run against the Cortex Cloud inventory and audit-log datasets mirrored into XSIAM, asserting that each AI asset_type appears with its discovery metadata. A correlation rule fuses the per-asset-type discovery signals into one shadow-AI inventory coverage event so a DC can demonstrate full asset-discovery coverage in the executive readout.

execution.framework_reference_id: SIM-AISPM-001 — Cortex Cloud AI-SPM inventory scan + REST inventory probe

prerequisites.description: Cortex Cloud AI-SPM enabled and connected to the target AWS account.
ai-spm IaC module applied so the shadow-AI fixture is planted in the account.

payload.code:
# Posture validation — no detonation. Probe Cortex Cloud inventory for AI assets.
curl -fsSL -H "Authorization: Bearer ${CORTEX_CLOUD_API_TOKEN}" -H "Accept: application/json" "${CORTEX_CLOUD_API_BASE}/inventory?asset_type=ai&tag=CortexSimAISPMFinding" | jq '.assets | length'

expected_artifacts.description: AI-tagged SageMaker endpoint discovered in Cortex Cloud inventory.
AI-tagged SageMaker model, training-data store, and Lambda integration discovered.

cleanup.code: rm -f /tmp/aispm-planted.json /tmp/aispm-discovered.json; echo '[CortexSim] SIM-AISPM-001 cleanup complete — planted AWS assets owned by terraform destroy.'

xql_queries.name: AISPM-001 Ground Truth Manifest Capture Bookkeeping
xql_queries.query:
dataset = cloud_audit_logs
| filter _time > to_timestamp(current_time() - 1800)
| filter operation_name in ("terraform.output", "GetResources") and cloud_provider = "AWS"
| filter resource_tags contains "CortexSimAISPMFinding"
| fields _time, operation_name, resource_type, resource_tags

xql_queries.name: AISPM-001 AI Asset Scan Cycle Discovery
xql_queries.query:
dataset = ai_spm_findings
| filter _time > to_timestamp(current_time() - 1800)
| filter finding_type = "asset_discovered"
| filter asset_type in ("ai_endpoint", "ai_model", "ai_data_store", "ai_function_integration")
| comp count() as discovered by asset_type
| fields asset_type, discovered

xql_queries.name: AISPM-001 Inventory API AI Tagged Assets Count
xql_queries.query:
dataset = cortex_cloud_posture
| filter _time > to_timestamp(current_time() - 1800)
| filter asset_type in ("ai_endpoint", "ai_model", "ai_data_store", "ai_function_integration")
| filter tags contains "CortexSimAISPMFinding"
| comp count() as discovered_count by asset_type, ai_service
| filter discovered_count >= 1
| fields asset_type, ai_service, discovered_count

xql_queries.name: AISPM-001 Asset Discovery Coverage Reconciliation
xql_queries.query:
dataset = cortex_cloud_posture
| filter _time > to_timestamp(current_time() - 1800)
| filter tags contains "CortexSimAISPMFinding"
| filter asset_type in ("ai_endpoint", "ai_model", "ai_data_store", "ai_function_integration")
| comp count_distinct(asset_id) as discovered_assets
| filter discovered_assets >= 6
| fields discovered_assets

correlation_rules.name: Shadow-AI Inventory Coverage — Full Asset Discovery
correlation_rules.logic: XQL(AISPM-001 AI Asset Scan Cycle Discovery) AND XQL(AISPM-001 Inventory API AI Tagged Assets Count) AND XQL(AISPM-001 Asset Discovery Coverage Reconciliation)

analytics_modules: Cortex Cloud AI-SPM — Shadow-AI asset discovery and inventory enrichment
Cortex Cloud Posture — AI asset coverage reconciliation

products.evidence_query: dataset = cortex_cloud_posture | filter asset_type in ("ai_endpoint","ai_model","ai_data_store","ai_function_integration") | fields _time, asset_type, ai_service, tags
Correlation CR-AISPM-0001 fuses per-asset-type AI discovery signals into a single shadow-AI inventory coverage event.

use_cases.name: AI Asset Discovery & Inventory — Shadow AI
use_cases.description: Discover and inventory all AI/ML assets across the cloud estate and reconcile against the planted manifest for full coverage.

test_cases.objective: Every planted AI asset surfaces in the Cortex Cloud AI inventory within one scan cycle.
preconditions: Cortex Cloud AI-SPM connected to the AWS account.
steps: Observe the AI inventory view in Cortex Cloud.
success_criteria: Asset Discovery Coverage reconciliation returns >= 1 row.
Correlation CR-AISPM-0001 raises a shadow-AI coverage event.

preventive_controls: Mandate tagging and registration of all AI/ML assets via cloud provisioning guardrails.
Restrict who can create SageMaker endpoints, Bedrock integrations, and model-serving Lambdas.
Route all third-party LLM egress through an approved gateway so shadow integrations are visible.
detection_engineering: Alert when a new AI asset appears in inventory without an owning team tag.
Reconcile discovered AI assets against an approved registry on every scan cycle.
Track AI asset count trend to surface unmanaged sprawl.

references.title: Unit42 — Shadow AI in the Enterprise
MITRE ATT&CK T1526 — Cloud Service Discovery

changelog.author: Henry Reed
changelog.change: Authored real AI-SPM posture-discovery XQL against cortex_cloud_posture / ai_spm_findings / cloud_audit_logs, added correlation CR-AISPM-0001, enriched identity + panw_mapping. Promoted to active.
